---
title: "Seven design directions"
date: "2026-05-11"
description: "Seven mockups for the site's visual style, each named after a piece of the Bobble canon. The shortlist headed for the Style toggle."
categories: [design, mockups, bobbology]
path: /design-directions.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/design-directions.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the standalone page</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/design-directions.html");</script>
```
